claim_status_justification: customer is unsure about filing the claim

user_claim: Customer: I travel with this laptop every day, and yesterday was a mess because my bag got squeezed between two seats on the bus. | Support: Did the laptop stop working after that? | Customer: Not immediately. I restarted the laptop, cleaned the surface, and even checked if my mouse settings changed. | Support: Are you reporting a software issue or physical damage? | Customer: That is what confused me. At first I thought it was software, then I noticed the lower palm-rest area looked slightly off. | Support: Which part do you want the images reviewed for? | Customer: Not the screen, keyboard, or hinge. The actual claim is that the trackpad is cracked.
